notes: Pulled the file. Two leads worth running down before the weekend.
Cuff is annealed and ready for the stone. Will set it after the shift.
Kai's meet is Saturday at Mesa Vista. Blocking the morning.
Calling Dorothy Sunday at the usual time. Ben is checking on her midweek.
Buckle is done. Photographing it for the Etsy listing tonight.
Eddie ran ahead on the interview. Walked him back through it after.
Carb is soaking. Tacoma stays the daily until the '78 is sorted.
Angela wants three more cuffs by month end. Doable if the silver ships.
Ran the Red Rock loop with Kai. Legs felt good the whole way.
Long bench weekend. Set three turquoise cabs clean.
Court week. Coffee and not much else, weight held steady.
Shipped the Santa Fe order. Bolo ties packed and gone.
Surveillance on the drug case. Sat in the truck most of the night.
Sunday call with Dorothy ran long. Quiet bench afternoon.
Stamped a belt buckle blank. Steady hand, clean lines.
Missing persons follow-up near the Zuni Mountains. Long drive.
Stretched out the hamstrings before the morning run. Knee felt fine.
Polished the cuff Angela ordered. Took Copper out after for a long walk.
Range morning at Red Rock. Steady groups, good light.
Cold bench day. Foam rolled the back and called it early.
